attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
BATCH_ID                      
,ADJ_CAT_ID                    
,ADJ_SOURCE_ID                 
,ADJ_TYPE_DESC                 
,ADJ_TYPE_ID                   
,ADJ_TYPE_NAME                 
,ADJ_TYPE_TYPE                 
,ALLOCATION_METHOD             
,ATTRIBUTE1                    
,ATTRIBUTE10                   
,ATTRIBUTE2                    
,ATTRIBUTE3                    
,ATTRIBUTE4                    
,ATTRIBUTE5                    
,ATTRIBUTE6                    
,ATTRIBUTE7                    
,ATTRIBUTE8                    
,ATTRIBUTE9                    
,CCRM_FLAG                     
,CHANNEL                       
,COGS_PERCENT                  
,COGS_SOURCE                   
,CREATED_BY                    
,CREATION_DATE                 
,CUSTOMER                      
,DB_SOURCE_NAME                
,DEST_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID          
,ENABLED_FLAG                  
,END_DATE_ACTIVE               
,FROM_CLAUSE                   
,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,GLOBAL_NAME                   
,GL_POSTABLE_FLAG              
,LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             
,NOTES                         
,PRODUCT                       
,REPORT_LEVEL_1_ID             
,REPORT_LEVEL_2_ID             
,REV_PERCENT                   
,SALES                         
,SELECT_CLAUSE                 
,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
,START_DATE_ACTIVE             
,WHERE_CLAUSE                  
,CREATE_DATETIME               
,ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI'  AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OM_CFI_ADJ_TYPE_ALL_REV SOCATA
WHERE (NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM 
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SOCATA.GLOBAL_NAME))

SELECT 
 TVOUTPUT.BATCH_ID,
 TVOUTPUT.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
 TVOUTPUT.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_LVL2_TYP_CD,
 CAST(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT AS DATE) AS START_TV_DT, 
 COALESCE(MAX (TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT - INTERVAL '1' DAY) OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD
                         ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 
                         FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') AS END_TV_DT,
 TVOUTPUT.DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_END_DTM ,
 TVOUTPUT.DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_START_DTM ,
 TVOUTPUT.DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_DESCR,
 TVOUTPUT.SK_ADJ_TYPE_ID_INT,
 TVOUTPUT.SS_CD SS_CD,
 TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE,
 TVOUTPUT.EXCEPTION_TYPE,
 ROW_NUMBER () 
 OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD
                         ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC) AS RANK_INDEX, 
 (CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NDCATTV.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD IS NOT NULL 
 THEN 'U'ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE
 FROM
 (
        SELECT 
         BATCH_ID,
         BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
         BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_LVL2_TYP_CD,
         DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_START_DTM ,
         DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_END_DTM ,
         DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_DESCR,
         SK_ADJ_TYPE_ID_INT,
         START_TV_DT,
         CREATE_DATETIME,
         ACTION_CODE,
         EXCEPTION_TYPE,
         SS_CD,
         ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_LVL2_TYP_CD,
         DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_START_DTM,DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_END_DTM,
         DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_DESCR ORDER BY CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM 
        FROM 
                 (
                 SELECT 
                 SOCATA.BATCH_ID,
                 SOCATA.ADJ_TYPE_NAME BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
                 REP_LEV_2.LOOKUP_VALUE   BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_LVL2_TYP_CD ,
                 SOCATA.START_DATE_ACTIVE  DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_START_DTM ,
                 SOCATA.END_DATE_ACTIVE  DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_END_DTM ,
                 SOCATA.ADJ_TYPE_DESC DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_DESCR,
                 SOCATA.ADJ_TYPE_ID SK_ADJ_TYPE_ID_INT,
                 CAST ( SOCATA.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DT,
                 SOCATA.CREATE_DATETIME,
                 SOCATA.ACTION_CODE, 
                 'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
                 NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  SS_CD
                 FROM 
                 $$STGDB.ST_OM_CFI_ADJ_TYPE_ALL SOCATA
                 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
                                         ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SOCATA.GLOBAL_NAME)
                 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_CFI_ADJ_LOOKUPS  REP_LEV_1
                                         ON( SOCATA.REPORT_LEVEL_1_ID = REP_LEV_1.LOOKUP_ID
                                                                 AND REP_LEV_1.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'LEVEL1')
                 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_CFI_ADJ_LOOKUPS  REP_LEV_2
                                         ON( SOCATA.REPORT_LEVEL_2_ID = REP_LEV_2.LOOKUP_ID
                                                                 AND REP_LEV_2.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'LEVEL2')
                 WHERE REP_LEV_1.LOOKUP_VALUE<>'INDIRECT'     
              
                UNION ALL  

                  /*    LSS Lot2A :  Included CG flow  */

		         SELECT 
		         ST.BATCH_ID,
		         ST.DESCRIPTION as BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD    ,
		         ST.LOOKUP_TYPE as BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_LVL2_TYP_CD,
		         ST.START_DATE_ACTIVE  as DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_START_DTM ,           
		         ST.END_DATE_ACTIVE   as DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_END_DTM,   
		         ST.DESCRIPTION as DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_DESCR,
		         EOCATA.ADJ_TYPE_ID  ,
		         CAST ( ST.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DT,
		                         ST.CREATE_DATETIME,
		                         ST.ACTION_CODE, 
		                         'NE' as EXCEPTION_TYPE,
		                         NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  as SS_CD
		         FROM
		         $$STGDB.ST_CG_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES_AR ST
		        INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		            ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= ST.GLOBAL_NAME)
		        INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_CFI_ADJ_TYPE_ALL EOCATA
                   ON ST.DESCRIPTION = EOCATA.ADJ_TYPE_NAME            
		         WHERE ST.LANG = 'US'
		         AND  ST.LOOKUP_TYPE='RMA RESERVE'
		         AND (
		                        NOT EXISTS
		                              ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CFI_ADJ_TYPE_ALL  ST_1
		                                 WHERE ST_1.ADJ_TYPE_NAME = ST.DESCRIPTION )
		                      OR NOT EXISTS
		                         ( SELECT  1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_TV NDCA
		                            WHERE NDCA.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD = ST.DESCRIPTION
		                             AND SS_CD IN ( 'BV','QTC' ) ) )
		          QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY ST.LOOKUP_TYPE, ST.LANG, ST.SECURITY_GROUP_ID, ST.LOOKUP_CODE, ST.VIEW_APPLICATION_ID, ST.GLOBAL_NAME 
		           ORDER BY CASE WHEN ATTRIBUTE1 IS NULL THEN '2' ELSE '1' END, ST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)  =1

                 UNION ALL
                 SELECT 
                 -999 BATCH_ID,
                 NDCATTV.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
                 NDCATTV.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_LVL2_TYP_CD,
                 NDCATTV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_START_DTM ,
                 NDCATTV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_END_DTM ,
                 NDCATTV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_DESCR,
                 NDCATTV.SK_ADJ_TYPE_ID_INT,
                 NDCATTV.START_TV_DT,
                 NDCATTV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
                 'X' ACTION_CODE, 
                 'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
                 NDCATTV.SS_CD
                 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_TV NDCATTV  
                 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
                 ON ( NDCATTV.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
                 WHERE NDCATTV.END_TV_DT= CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
                 AND (BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD)        IN
                  (  SELECT ADJ_TYPE_NAME FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CFI_ADJ_TYPE_ALL
                      UNION
                     SELECT DESCRIPTION as ADJ_TYPE_NAME FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES_AR ST
                      WHERE (
                       NOT EXISTS
                        ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CFI_ADJ_TYPE_ALL  ST_1
                           WHERE ST_1.ADJ_TYPE_NAME = ST.DESCRIPTION )
                      OR NOT EXISTS
                      ( SELECT  1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_TV NDCA
                        WHERE NDCA.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD = ST.DESCRIPTION
                        AND SS_CD IN ( 'BV','QTC' ) ) )
                      )
        ) TVINPUT 
         QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD, 
          TVINPUT.START_TV_DT ORDER BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
 )TVOUTPUT 
 LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_TV NDCATTV             
 ON TVOUTPUT.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD=NDCATTV.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD
 AND NDCATTV.END_TV_DT = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
 WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1

SELECT
BATCH_ID                      ,
ADJ_CAT_ID                    ,
ADJ_SOURCE_ID                 ,
ADJ_TYPE_DESC                 ,
ADJ_TYPE_ID                   ,
ADJ_TYPE_NAME                 ,
ADJ_TYPE_TYPE                 ,
ALLOCATION_METHOD             ,
ATTRIBUTE1                    ,
ATTRIBUTE10                   ,
ATTRIBUTE2                    ,
ATTRIBUTE3                    ,
ATTRIBUTE4                    ,
ATTRIBUTE5                    ,
ATTRIBUTE6                    ,
ATTRIBUTE7                    ,
ATTRIBUTE8                    ,
ATTRIBUTE9                    ,
CCRM_FLAG                     ,
CHANNEL                       ,
COGS_PERCENT                  ,
COGS_SOURCE                   ,
CREATED_BY                    ,
CREATION_DATE                 ,
CUSTOMER                      ,
DB_SOURCE_NAME                ,
DEST_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID          ,
ENABLED_FLAG                  ,
END_DATE_ACTIVE               ,
FROM_CLAUSE                   ,
GES_UPDATE_DATE               ,
GLOBAL_NAME                   ,
GL_POSTABLE_FLAG              ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY               ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE              ,
LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             ,
NOTES                         ,
PRODUCT                       ,
REPORT_LEVEL_1_ID             ,
REPORT_LEVEL_2_ID             ,
REV_PERCENT                   ,
SALES                         ,
SELECT_CLAUSE                 ,
SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               ,
START_DATE_ACTIVE             ,
WHERE_CLAUSE                  ,
CREATE_DATETIME               ,
ACTION_CODE                   
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_CFI_ADJ_TYPE_ALL
WHERE  EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'

SELECT
BATCH_ID                      ,
LOOKUP_TYPE                   ,
LANG                          ,
LOOKUP_CODE                   ,
MEANING                       ,
DESCRIPTION                   ,
ENABLED_FLAG                  ,
START_DATE_ACTIVE             ,
END_DATE_ACTIVE               ,
CREATED_BY                    ,
CREATION_DATE                 ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY               ,
LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE              ,
SOURCE_LANG                   ,
SECURITY_GROUP_ID             ,
VIEW_APPLICATION_ID           ,
TERRITORY_CODE                ,
ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY            ,
ATTRIBUTE1                    ,
ATTRIBUTE2                    ,
ATTRIBUTE3                    ,
ATTRIBUTE4                    ,
ATTRIBUTE5                    ,
ATTRIBUTE6                    ,
ATTRIBUTE7                    ,
ATTRIBUTE8                    ,
ATTRIBUTE9                    ,
ATTRIBUTE10                   ,
ATTRIBUTE11                   ,
ATTRIBUTE12                   ,
ATTRIBUTE13                   ,
ATTRIBUTE14                   ,
ATTRIBUTE15                   ,
TAG                           ,
LEAF_NODE                     ,
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME            ,
GLOBAL_NAME                   ,
CREATE_DATETIME               ,
ACTION_CODE                   
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_CFI_ADJ_TYPE_ALL
WHERE  EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'

SELECT	SCFLVA.BATCH_ID, SCFLVA.LOOKUP_TYPE,
		SCFLVA.LANG, SCFLVA.LOOKUP_CODE,
		SCFLVA.MEANING, SCFLVA.DESCRIPTION,
		SCFLVA.ENABLED_FLAG, SCFLVA.START_DATE_ACTIVE,
		SCFLVA.END_DATE_ACTIVE, SCFLVA.CREATED_BY,
		SCFLVA.CREATION_DATE, SCFLVA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
		SCFLVA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, SCFLVA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
		SCFLVA.SOURCE_LANG, SCFLVA.SECURITY_GROUP_ID,
		SCFLVA.VIEW_APPLICATION_ID, SCFLVA.TERRITORY_CODE,
		SCFLVA.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, SCFLVA.ATTRIBUTE1,
		SCFLVA.ATTRIBUTE2, SCFLVA.ATTRIBUTE3,
		SCFLVA.ATTRIBUTE4, SCFLVA.ATTRIBUTE5,
		SCFLVA.ATTRIBUTE6, SCFLVA.ATTRIBUTE7,
		SCFLVA.ATTRIBUTE8, SCFLVA.ATTRIBUTE9,
		SCFLVA.ATTRIBUTE10, SCFLVA.ATTRIBUTE11,
		SCFLVA.ATTRIBUTE12, SCFLVA.ATTRIBUTE13,
		SCFLVA.ATTRIBUTE14, SCFLVA.ATTRIBUTE15,
		SCFLVA.TAG, SCFLVA.LEAF_NODE,
		SCFLVA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, SCFLVA.GLOBAL_NAME,
		SCFLVA.CREATE_DATETIME, SCFLVA.ACTION_CODE ,
'RI'  AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM	
$$STGDB.ST_CG_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES_AR SCFLVA
WHERE	NOT EXISTS
 (
SELECT	1 
FROM	
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 WHERE	NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SCFLVA.GLOBAL_NAME)
